subtitle.ja: 親指の輪に4本の指を入れ、親指手前の糸を取ります。取った糸は手首向こう側に落ちます
subtitle.en: Insert the four fingers into the thumb loops and pick up the near thumb strings. The picked-up strings fall to the far side of the wrists.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、人差し指の糸の下を通って小指向こうの糸を下から取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, pass under the index-finger strings and pick up from below the far little-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、人差し指向こうの糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, pick up the far index-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の小指の糸を外します
subtitle.en: Remove the little-finger strings on both hands.

subtitle.ja: 左右の小指で、親指向こう側の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both little fingers, pick up the far thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指の糸を全て外します
subtitle.en: Remove all strings from both thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、人差し指の糸を越えて小指手前の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, move over the index-finger strings and pick up the near little-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の2本の輪に親指を下から入れて輪を広げます
subtitle.en: Insert the thumbs from below into the two loops on each index finger and open the loops.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指から、上の2本の糸だけを残して下の1本の糸を外します
subtitle.en: Leaving only the upper two strings on both thumbs in place, remove the lower single string.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指の前にある三角の輪に、人差し指を上から入れます
subtitle.en: Insert the index fingers from above into the triangular loops in front of both thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 左右の小指の糸を外します
subtitle.en: Remove the little-finger strings on both hands.

subtitle.ja: 左右の手のひらを向こうに向けながら人差し指と親指を開きます。自然に外れた手首向こうの糸を、親指の輪の上に置きます
subtitle.en: Turn both palms to the far side while opening the index fingers and thumbs. Let the far wrist strings fall away naturally and place them over the thumb loops.

subtitle.ja: 親指の輪の上に乗せた糸を、左右の小指で親指の輪の中から引き出してにぎります
subtitle.en: With both little fingers, pull the strings placed over the thumb loops out from inside the thumb loops and grasp them.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指から全ての糸を外して完成です
subtitle.en: Remove all strings from both thumbs to finish.

subtitle.ja: 小指の輪の上の2本の糸を親指で持ち上げることで家の入り口が閉じ、親指を離すと入り口が開きます
subtitle.en: By lifting the two strings on top of the little-finger loops with the thumbs, the entrance of the house closes; when the thumbs are released, the entrance opens.
